sheet_name: แปลนโครงสร้างหลังคา, ขยาย 1
source_image: image/บ้าน_เล็ก_2ชั้น_01/บ้าน_เล็ก_2ชั้น_01_หน้า34.png
view_title: แปลนโครงสร้างหลังคา + ขยาย 1 (purlin-rafter hanger detail)
grid_source: raw_json_ตัวที่ใช้งานจริง/03บ้าน_เล็ก_2ชั้น_01/บ้าน_เล็ก_2ชั้น_01_หน้า00_gridline.json
schema_note: roof_plan is a draft pattern per spec section 1 (#12) -- light-gauge cold-formed steel purlins/rafters, not rebar. Roof frame covers the full grid span 1-3 with rafters at every named grid column (no rafter shown in the row-E dummy extension bay, consistent with S-06's absence there too).

steel_members.spacing_note: one rafter at every grid column position (1,2,3), running full length E to A

detail_reference: ดูแบบขยาย 1 (hanger detail, circled at roughly grid B-3) -- purlin-to-rafter hanger connection: เหล็กหางปลาขนาด 50x300x6.00mm ฝังในเสาคอนกริต (fishtail steel plate embedded in concrete column), จันทันเหล็กเชื่อมติดกับเหล็กหางปลาตลอดแนวสัมผัส (rafter welded to the fishtail plate along the full contact line) -- same wording as house #2's equivalent detail.
warnings: Unlike house #2, this roof only has x-axis overhangs (1.30m each side beyond grid 1/3) with no printed y-axis (E/A direction) overhang dimension on this sheet -- flagged since it's a genuine difference from house #2's pattern (which had both x and y overhangs), not an oversight.
The 1.30m eave overhangs are dimensional notes for the roof only, not structural grid/beam lines -- not added as dummy grid lines to the shared grid master.
